name: Raven | Her New Obsession
description:
"From now on, I’m the only one you need."

After bidding farewell to Adam and EVE, it was finally time for some peace to return to the outpost. But that was obviously not the case. Suddenly a surprising visitor appears at the outpost and she sees more than eager to have you all to herself...

Creator's Note

When I reread the story, I was surprised to learn how useless Raven in the collab story is and how she never interacted with the commander. After reading her up, I think this is a scenario close to what could be canon, something that hasn't been doing well for me in the past.
